report: eliza-1 harness benchmark — comprehensive model + kernel comparison

host.cpu: Intel Core Ultra 9 275HX (Arrow Lake-HX, 24 cores; AVX2 + AVX-VNNI + F16C, no AVX-512)
host.gpu: NVIDIA RTX 5080 Laptop (Blackwell, 16 GB VRAM, sm_120) — held by an in-flight full-corpus SFT (~12 GB), so all benches here are CPU-only or re-used from prior runs
host.note: CPU llama-bench numbers are lower bounds — measured concurrently with the SFT's data-loader CPU usage; idle-host figures are higher (text_model_2026-05-11 -t16 idle row: pp512 227 / tg128 24 for 0_6b).

caveats: All Eliza-1 text/TTS/ASR weights are documented STAND-INS: text = upstream Qwen3-0.6B/1.7B GGUF re-hosted (the published Qwen3.5-x.xx checkpoints do not exist yet); TTS = off-the-shelf omnivoice; ASR = ggml-org Qwen3-ASR-0.6B-GGUF (not tokenizer-fused). The elizaos/eliza-1-* HF model repos are not created yet.

ASR WER = 1.0 everywhere: the stand-in ASR GGUF + the stand-in TTS GGUF that synthesizes the test clips both have near-zero quality on this corpus, so WER reflects stand-in quality, not the eventual fused-ASR accuracy. RTF is content-independent and IS meaningful (~0.76 CPU on 0_6b).
Voice RTF >> 1.0 (8.6 on 0_6b CPU, 5.9 on 1_7b CPU): the bundle's omnivoice TTS GGUF runs through llama-server /v1/audio/speech on CPU only here; the <=0.5 gate is a GPU/Metal target.

PolarQuant Q4_POLAR is DEFERRED in the GGUF body: the fork's convert_hf_to_gguf.py does not yet emit q4_polar, so the eliza1-bundle-gpu GGUF ships a Q8_0 body with PolarQuant/QJL/TurboQuant sidecars (weight_quant.deferred=true). Runtime kernels exist (CUDA cuda-verify 8/8 on RTX 5080; CPU reference 8/8).

The test-SFT 0_6b is an 8000-sample / 1-epoch slice run (eval_loss 1.315). The full-corpus 0_6b SFT (68,297 rows, 1 epoch) is IN FLIGHT on the RTX 5080 as of 2026-05-12 (~8% done, ETA ~2026-05-13); its gate_report / GGUF / eliza1 bundle do not exist yet.

action-selection accuracy and personality PASS% require a live LLM provider + a judge model; neither is wired in this headless context, so both are recorded not-run. eliza_bench / native_tool_call were run via HF transformers on CPU on the test-SFT checkpoint (fresh, 2026-05-11 20:31) and re-used; they were NOT run against the GGUF bundles (the bundle text-eval perplexity score IS the GGUF text-quality datapoint).
The 1_7b base SFT is itself in progress (seq-4096 OOM'd; re-running at seq 2048) — the 1_7b row here is the eliza1-bundle (stand-in Qwen3-1.7B Q4_K_M re-host), not a fine-tune.

base_qwen3_0_6b.what: upstream Qwen/Qwen3-0.6B, no SFT (the documented eliza-1-0_6b stand-in base)
base_qwen3_0_6b.native_tool_call: n=0 response bucket (no native tool-call rows in data/final/test.jsonl)

testsft_0_6b.what: checkpoints/eliza-1-0_6b-apollo-1778551769 — APOLLO-mini full-param SFT, 8000-sample slice, 1 epoch, eval_loss 1.315; GGUF = final-Q4_K_M.gguf (396 MB)
testsft_0_6b.kernel_verify: n/a (GGUF body Q4_K_M, no quant sidecars on this slice run)

gate.verdict: conditional-go — beat base on every metric, regressed none; did not clear the absolute 0.7/0.5 format_ok floor on the 35-row smoke corpus

eliza1_bundle_0_6b.what: ~/.eliza/local-inference/models/eliza-1-0_6b.bundle (text = Qwen3-0.6B Q3_K_M re-host) + the eliza1-bundle-gpu GGUF checkpoints/eliza-1-0_6b-apollo-1778515903/milady-optimized-gpu (PolarQuant+QJL+TurboQuant sidecars, GGUF body Q8_0)
eliza1_bundle_0_6b.kernel_verify: CPU dispatch=pass (kernel-contract + reference-test, turbo3/turbo4/qjl/polarquant/dflash); CUDA=runtime-ready (cuda-verify 8/8 on RTX 5080 sm_120); Vulkan dispatch=pass; Metal source-complete (needs-hardware)

gate.overall: FAIL (stand-in weights — expected; the structural/kernel gates pass)

base_qwen3_1_7b.what: upstream Qwen/Qwen3-1.7B (eliza-1-1_7b stand-in base); SFT in progress (seq-4096 OOM'd, re-running at seq 2048)
base_qwen3_1_7b.note: no fine-tune artifact yet — see eliza1_bundle_1_7b for the GGUF/eval row

eliza1_bundle_1_7b.what: ~/.eliza/local-inference/models/eliza-1-1_7b.bundle (text = Qwen3-1.7B Q4_K_M re-host, 1.19 GiB) + PolarQuant/QJL/TurboQuant sidecars (GGUF body Q4_K_M)
eliza1_bundle_1_7b.kernel_verify: same as 0_6b — CPU pass / CUDA runtime-ready / Vulkan pass / Metal needs-hardware

gate.dflash_accept_0.65: FAIL (0.55 — the stamp-only same-size drafter at this tier accepts less)

fullcorpus_sft_0_6b.what: checkpoints/eliza-1-0_6b-apollo-fullcorpus-1778563093 — APOLLO-mini full-param SFT over the 68,297-row combined corpus (eliza1-sft-0_6b ahead of data/final), seq 4096, Liger on, lr 1e-5, 1 epoch
fullcorpus_sft_0_6b.status: IN FLIGHT on the RTX 5080 as of 2026-05-12 — ~8% of 8538 steps (step ~845), ~12.7 s/it ⇒ ~28 h remaining, ETA ~2026-05-13; first eval at step 500: eval_loss 1.43
fullcorpus_sft_0_6b.kernel_verify: n/a (run_pipeline.py --eval-mode full will auto-chain gate bench + quant + eliza1 bundle at the tail)

cuda_rtx5080_sm120.evidence: cuda-verify + cuda-verify-fused 8/8 numeric match on RTX 5080 (Blackwell cc 12.0, driver 580.142, CUDA 13.0, nvcc 12.0 sm_90 PTX JIT'd to sm_120)
cuda_rtx5080_sm120.note: verified again 2026-05-12 alongside the in-flight SFT — short verify runs, no contention

metal_apple.note: Metal graph-dispatch + polar-preht + fused-attn shaders shipped; runtime-ready gate needs an Apple device in CI

winners.text_format_ok: testsft_0_6b (0.20) > base (0.0857) — only fine-tune with real data; full-corpus run will be the real number
winners.gen_tps_cpu_d0_pp512: testsft_0_6b Q4_K_M (500) > q4polar/q8body (432) > bundle_0_6b Q3_K_M (331) > 1_7b (219) — Q8_0 body's better prefill but worse decode vs Q4_K_M is the expected bpw tradeoff
winners.dflash_accept: eliza1_bundle_0_6b (0.87, stamp-only same-size drafter — upper bound) >> 1_7b (0.55, below the 0.65 floor — the larger target makes each rejected round costlier)
winners.text_eval_perplexity_score: eliza1_bundle_1_7b (0.328) > eliza1_bundle_0_6b (0.2779) — bigger stand-in base; neither clears the gate (stand-in weights)
winners.peak_rss: eliza1_bundle_0_6b (957 MB) < 1_7b (2334 MB) — the 0_6b is the only tier that fits a phone-class RSS budget

still_pending: full-corpus SFT 0_6b — ~28 h remaining (ETA 2026-05-13); gate_report / GGUF / eliza1 bundle then auto-generated by run_pipeline.py --eval-mode full
action-selection accuracy + personality PASS% — need a live LLM provider + judge model (ELIZA_RUN_ACTION_BENCHMARK=1 + a provider; personality-bench src/runner.ts needs trajectory run dirs + a judge)
d16k CPU llama-bench sweep — the 16384-token prompt run took >15 min/model under SFT CPU contention; CUDA -DGGML_CUDA=ON build OOM'd earlier (needs an idle host or wait for the SFT to finish)
real ASR WER — needs real recorded WAV+.txt pairs AND the tokenizer-fused Qwen3-ASR weights (not the stand-in)
embedding bench on Linux/CPU — only the Metal/M4Max run exists; the Linux run was skipped
